    D

    delegate() - Method in class io.github.rhusar.securenio.channels.SecureDatagramChannel
    Returns the underlying raw (unencrypted) channel, for use with selector registration.
    delegate() - Method in class io.github.rhusar.securenio.channels.SecureServerSocketChannel
    Returns the underlying raw (unencrypted) server channel.
    delegate() - Method in class io.github.rhusar.securenio.channels.SecureSocketChannel
    Returns the underlying raw (unencrypted) channel, for use with selector registration.
    DelegatingSelectorProvider - Class in io.github.rhusar.securenio.channels.spi
    A SelectorProvider whose sole purpose is to provide a DelegatingSelector capable of handling registration of TLS/DTLS-wrapped channels.
    DelegatingSelectorProvider() - Constructor for class io.github.rhusar.securenio.channels.spi.DelegatingSelectorProvider
     
    disconnect() - Method in class io.github.rhusar.securenio.channels.SecureDatagramChannel

    io.github.rhusar.securenio.channels - package io.github.rhusar.securenio.channels
    Secure NIO channel decorators that transparently add TLS and DTLS encryption to standard java.nio.channels types.
    io.github.rhusar.securenio.channels.spi - package io.github.rhusar.securenio.channels.spi
    Service-provider support for using secure channels with a Selector.
    isConnected() - Method in class io.github.rhusar.securenio.channels.SecureDatagramChannel
     
    isConnected() - Method in class io.github.rhusar.securenio.channels.SecureSocketChannel
     
    isConnectionPending() - Method in class io.github.rhusar.securenio.channels.SecureSocketChannel
     
    isHandshaking() - Method in class io.github.rhusar.securenio.channels.SecureDatagramChannel
    Returns whether the DTLS handshake is currently in progress.

    retransmit() - Method in class io.github.rhusar.securenio.channels.SecureDatagramChannel
    Re-sends the last handshake flight.

    S

    SecureDatagramChannel - Class in io.github.rhusar.securenio.channels
    A DatagramChannel decorator that transparently wraps a raw channel with DTLS encryption and decryption.
    SecureDatagramChannel(DatagramChannel, SSLEngine, ExecutorService) - Constructor for class io.github.rhusar.securenio.channels.SecureDatagramChannel
     
    SecureServerSocketChannel - Class in io.github.rhusar.securenio.channels
    A ServerSocketChannel decorator that wraps a raw server socket channel, producing SecureSocketChannel instances for each accepted connection.
    SecureServerSocketChannel(ServerSocketChannel, SSLContext, ExecutorService) - Constructor for class io.github.rhusar.securenio.channels.SecureServerSocketChannel
     
    SecureSocketChannel - Class in io.github.rhusar.securenio.channels
    A SocketChannel decorator that transparently wraps a raw channel with TLS/SSL encryption and decryption.
    SecureSocketChannel(SocketChannel, SSLEngine, ExecutorService) - Constructor for class io.github.rhusar.securenio.channels.SecureSocketChannel
     
    send(ByteBuffer, SocketAddress) - Method in class io.github.rhusar.securenio.channels.SecureDatagramChannel

    setOption(SocketOption, T) - Method in class io.github.rhusar.securenio.channels.SecureSocketChannel
